# BRIEF

## User-Facing Goal

Make it easier to preview the live public page while editing a project.

## Success Criteria

- An eye button appears near the project title in the editor.
- Clicking it opens the project public page in a new tab.
- The button follows the existing dashboard preview style.

## UX Notes

- Keep the control compact and icon-only.
- Do not introduce a new layout pattern.

## Risks Or Tradeoffs

- Draft projects without a saved slug should not show a broken preview link.
